programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Martha and Elli stand their ground in a dangerous encounter with a bull moose; Mike sets off for uncharted territory; Tom resurrects a primitive recurve bow; Jake is hot on the trail of a mating pair of mountain lions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom and Nancy create a masterpiece out of a raw wolf hide; Jake and his young dogs tangle with two mountain lion kittens; Eustace teaches his neighbors how to put food on the table; Mike goes full fur on Whale Island; Ice jam traps Josh.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jake carries his best dog off the mountain after a battle with a large mountain lion; Mike flies to the end of the earth for the last round-up; Martha and Ellie rescue a hunter stranded in sub-zero temperatures.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry bring down an enormous bull bison; Eustace races the weather to provide his neighbors with heat; Martha and Elli battle nasty terrain while transporting their prized moose harvest back to civilization; Jake pursues mountain lions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Martha and Elli stand their ground in a dangerous encounter with a bull moose; Mike sets off for uncharted territory; Tom resurrects a primitive recurve bow; Jake is hot on the trail of a mating pair of mountain lions.

programme.desc: Tom and Nancy create a masterpiece out of a raw wolf hide; Jake and his young dogs tangle with two mountain lion kittens; Eustace teaches his neighbors how to put food on the table; Mike goes full fur on Whale Island; Ice jam traps Josh.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jake carries his best dog off the mountain after a battle with a large mountain lion; Mike flies to the end of the earth for the last round-up; Martha and Ellie rescue a hunter stranded in sub-zero temperatures.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Mike returns to the bear-infested crags of Kodiak to reclaim his mountain goat kill; Jason hunts down a wild hog to feed his family; Kidd and Harry blow up a beaver dam to save their water supply; Josh goes on the offensive against wolves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep
programme.desc: MyMagnesiumTM ProClinical delivers 350 mg of highly absorbable magnesium plus clinically studied Shoden® Ashwagandha, vitamin D, Zinc, Boron, and antioxidant-rich organic blueberries—designed to support calm focus, steady energy, and deeper sleep.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Dawn met Carey while working on the West Coast where they started their family; now that Carey has retired, Dawn has convinced him to move back home with her to the East Coast; Carey's only requirement is to live by the ocean.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is a wonderful day; after experiencing a health scare, they realize it is time to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with an ocean view; they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lane and Tristan love finding homes and renovating them to their taste. This time, as they search for their forever home by the ocean, Lane wants a turn-key property so they can focus on settling in. Tristan agrees but secretly dreams of customizing another home. With the help of their best friend and realtor Susan, will they be able to find a home that makes them both happy?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Misty and Derrick have always felt a deep connection to the ocean; after facing health challenges, they realized life is too short not to live where their hearts belong; now they are on the hunt for a rural home that offers a seaside lifestyle while keeping them close to nature; will they find the perfect balance of peace, ocean, and adventure?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: With retirement around the corner, Svetlana and Harrison are ready to begin their next chapter by the water; Harrison loves the crisp coastal weather, while Svetlana has always dreamed of ocean views; a small town in Nova Scotia offers the perfect balance, and now they're searching for a home to host family and enjoy their golden years together.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Katie and Matt thought they had found their dream home, but Katie realized one thing was missing, the ocean; having grown up by the water, she is determined to give her children the same coastal childhood; now they are leaving their perfect inland home behind, ready to trade some luxury for life by the sea; will they find the perfect oceanfront home for their family?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Laura and Trevor met on a tree planting jobsite; they fell in love and built a tree planting business that operates throughout Canada; after deciding to move to Nova Scotia, where Laura is from, they decided to rent because their work kept them traveling throughout most of the year; after many years of saving, they feel like they can finally find a place to put down their own roots and smell the ocean breeze.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: College sweethearts Amy and Aron never imagined they would be empty nesters in their 40's, but here they are with two children about to move out and their dreams of retiring by the ocean closer than ever; they have decided to live that dream now and are on the hunt for a home by the water with enough land to have a few goats.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Growing up in England, living by the water was only a dream for the wealthy; after moving to Nova Scotia as a teenager, that dream of ocean living became something that might one day be accessible to her.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Long-time friends and now partners, Kirby and Menna are on the hunt for their perfect home together; they are both avid water enthusiasts and want a home where they can have great parties.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Nova Scotia natives Kim and Ryan have wanted an oceanfront home for as long as they have been together. They decided to downsize their home to buy a boat and live closer to the water. Even after downsizing, they still couldn't afford a home right on the water. Now, after years of saving, they are in the right financial place to look for their dream oceanfront home and a place to park their boat permanently.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lovebirds Sydney and Sebastian have decided to take on their next big adventure and invest in a coastal dream property where they can live with their young boys while running a hospitality business; while they have years of real estate investing under their belts, they've never run this type of business before, so they are excited to try.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Emily and Kye are home flippers and landlords; since they have been together, they have only ever lived in homes with tenants, but after their second daughter was born, they decided they had had enough of sharing space.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Judith and John fell in love by chance when he renovated her home; they got married and moved into a beautiful condo to live an urban lifestyle in Vancouver, but the condo life isn't giving them the family entertaining space they were each so used to; after a trip to Nova Scotia, they realized that is where they need to be, and now they are on the hunt for their forever home.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Susanna and Will have spent their entire relationship renovating and flipping homes; they have never lived in a home that is just for them; with their two boys out of the house, they have decided it's time to have the home they've always wanted.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Ross and Linda are upsizing their lakefront home to better entertain their growing family; touring properties with acres of land, stunning log construction, and impressive water frontage, they're searching for the perfect backdrop for memory-making.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Creative couple Aneal and Travis are searching for a lakefront home that sparks inspiration and is perfect for entertaining; from a modern-rustic retreat with a sleek kitchen and private wellness center, to a cozy cabin with vaulted ceilings and a dreamy dockside yard, to a minimalist hideaway with 250 feet of waterfront, which home will turn their vision of the perfect lake life into reality?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: With nine kids, Abby and Wayne are looking for a home where their bustling family can truly thrive; their search takes them from a log-inspired estate on 100 acres to a modern retreat with a private community beach, and finally to a multi-level canal home designed for gathering and fun; can they find the perfect match for their lively crew?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Kristin and Scott, who have retired early and are ready for a permanent vacation, are searching for their ultimate lakefront oasis; they tour a sleek modern home with a pool, guest house, and cozy round fireplace, an elegant estate with grand Roman columns and breathtaking lake views, and a contemporary marvel featuring custom millwork, a spa-like shower, and endless spaces to entertain by the water; which lakefront escape will be their perfect retreat?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jess and Jimmy are each selling their homes and pooling their resources to find the perfect place to start their life together; their tour takes them from a sleek, open-concept home built for unforgettable gatherings, to a grand lakeside bungalow where every window frames nature's beauty, and finally to a cozy island log cabin with sunlit lofts and decks made for relaxing by the water; which home can become their dream retreat?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Paul and Sharena are on the hunt for their dream lakefront home, balancing Sharena's love of glitz with Paul's rustic tastes; their first stop is a sleek, modern home with mirrored cabinets, crystal light fixtures, a built-in vanity in the primary suite, and a sparkling pool, perfect for Sharena; next, they tour a rustic retreat with vaulted ceilings, exposed beams, and a trail leading through nature to the lake, Paul's ideal escape; the final home blends both styles with an oversized kitchen.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Ross and Linda are upsizing their lakefront home to better entertain their growing family; touring properties with acres of land, stunning log construction, and impressive water frontage, they're searching for the perfect backdrop for memory-making.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Creative couple Aneal and Travis are searching for a lakefront home that sparks inspiration and is perfect for entertaining; from a modern-rustic retreat with a sleek kitchen and private wellness center, to a cozy cabin with vaulted ceilings and a dreamy dockside yard, to a minimalist hideaway with 250 feet of waterfront, which home will turn their vision of the perfect lake life into reality?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: With nine kids, Abby and Wayne are looking for a home where their bustling family can truly thrive; their search takes them from a log-inspired estate on 100 acres to a modern retreat with a private community beach, and finally to a multi-level canal home designed for gathering and fun; can they find the perfect match for their lively crew?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Kristin and Scott, who have retired early and are ready for a permanent vacation, are searching for their ultimate lakefront oasis; they tour a sleek modern home with a pool, guest house, and cozy round fireplace, an elegant estate with grand Roman columns and breathtaking lake views, and a contemporary marvel featuring custom millwork, a spa-like shower, and endless spaces to entertain by the water; which lakefront escape will be their perfect retreat?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jess and Jimmy are each selling their homes and pooling their resources to find the perfect place to start their life together; their tour takes them from a sleek, open-concept home built for unforgettable gatherings, to a grand lakeside bungalow where every window frames nature's beauty, and finally to a cozy island log cabin with sunlit lofts and decks made for relaxing by the water; which home can become their dream retreat?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Paul and Sharena are on the hunt for their dream lakefront home, balancing Sharena's love of glitz with Paul's rustic tastes; their first stop is a sleek, modern home with mirrored cabinets, crystal light fixtures, a built-in vanity in the primary suite, and a sparkling pool, perfect for Sharena; next, they tour a rustic retreat with vaulted ceilings, exposed beams, and a trail leading through nature to the lake, Paul's ideal escape; the final home blends both styles with an oversized kitchen.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom ventures into new territory for beaver; Jake puts his young dogs to the test, but one goes missing on the mountain; Kidd and Harry navigate a gauntlet of river ice on a midwinter fishing expedition.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Eustace uses his Mountain Man knowledge to get water to flow uphill to supply his young neighbors; Jake's truck slides off an icy road leaving him stranded.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Josh battles a blizzard and an onslaught of predators to protect his bison; Kidd and Harry navigate dangerous rapids to rescue a stranded pack mule.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Josh witnesses a bison give birth to the first calf of spring; Kidd and Harry load a mule into their boat and transport it down river through raging rapids; Jake runs two mountain lions up the same tree.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Montana's Tom and Nancy Oar prepare for the long winter ahead; Jake Herak battles dense fog and mountain terrain on foot in pursuit of elk; Josh Kirk attempts to move a 150-year-old log cabin to the heart of his bison ranch in Wyoming.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer signs on to move two bucking bulls; Marc runs into trouble transporting a fragile experimental aircraft.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc wins the right to move a 1928 train caboose, while Roy must transport a 1955 Ford Thunderbird that is in pristine condition.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy bids to move a catering food truck from a famous New York restaurant, then has to perform additional work; Jarrett transports a 400-pound African sculpture.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie move two pieces of music history owned by the king of rock 'n' roll; Jarrett races to a restaurant opening.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy delivers a coin-operated ride to a boy who recently lost his father; Chris and Robbie get into trouble with the law.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.sub-title: Planes, Pains, and a Spire of Flames
programme.desc: The transport of a Mini-MAX airplane tests Jennifer's patience; Marc races to make a valuable delivery.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy's truck breaks down for the final time; Jarrett delivers a $150,000 restored DeLorean to a demanding customer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie transport a huge spider to an amusement park; Roy is forced to improvise the loading of a 42-foot water tower.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc labors to deliver a kinetic sculpture to Los Angeles, but a tight deadline and mechanical difficulties bring him to the boiling point; Jarrett learns his creepy cargo may be stolen property.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer calls Roy for help when she is saddled with some wild bucking bulls; Chris and Robbie overestimate their ability to transport an oversize houseboat.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The transport of a small racing boat drives Jennifer to tears; Jarrett's bad measurements deal him a financial setback.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett questions his ability to transport an electric sports car; safety-minded Marc has concerns about his haul.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A customer demands a discount when Jarrett fails to deliver a shipment of surfboards on time; Marc agrees to transport a monster truck, only to learn the vehicle has no "travel wheels.".

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy takes a ride on a submersible boat; Jennifer hauls a set of large window displays to a Hollywood candy store.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett hauls a life-size version of a popular children's game and a hot-rod casket; Jennifer races the clock to transport a pregnant horse.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad, and the Evel
programme.desc: Marc's childhood comes alive when he gets the opportunity to haul daredevil Evel Knievel's original tractor-trailer; Robbie brings her son along on a transport that soon turns dangerous.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy loads a dining table made from a 1957 Chevy and a vintage penny-arcade sign; Chris and Robbie haul a giant, ominous-looking missile.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer must package and transport a model ship that took 10 years to construct; Jarrett loads a crate of priceless dinosaur fossils.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc's big rig is sidelined for repairs; Chris transports a boat by sea, but his attractive shipmates prove to be a distraction.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie convert one of their rigs to run on vegetable oil; Roy hopes to lure his son into the transport business.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The presence of a bride-to-be messes up Chris and Robbie's carefully planned one-day run; Jarrett teams up with Roy to deliver a load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc plans to pepper a friend's run with pranks; the strange owner of a cold, creepy load joins Jennifer on her delivery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
